Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-22-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-04-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606

Minor'S Compromise Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
James A. Michel, Esq. appeared with petitioner Joe Gonzales who was present as Guardian ad litem for Marisol Gonzales, a minor Claimant who was also present as today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00
Attorney's Fees - $0.00
Medical Expenses - $0.00
Costs - $0.00
A net balance of $5,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, located at 3998 24th Street, San Francisco, CA 94114. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
